untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection (Double Bottom with two distinct lows of equal price levels, middle resistance level, and right-bottom characteristics) requires multi-bar pattern recognition logic not available in allowed indicators. Entry condition 'breakout above middle resistance' cannot be precisely encoded without explicit support/resistance or pattern-detection indicators. Exit conditions reference market regime-dependent price targets (67% rise in bull, 54% in bear) that require dynamic target calculation not supported by static indicator rules.
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate using pivot points as resistance/support proxy and volume trend via volume comparison to sma_20, but true double-bottom pattern detection is not expressible with the allowed indicator set. A custom pattern detector would be required for accurate implementation of this Bulkowski signal.
